parameters.label: Draw Mouse Line
parameters.description: When enabled, a line is drawn from the center of the screen to the current mouse position.

parameters.label: Show Mouse Position
parameters.description: Displays a visual indicator at the current mouse position on the Dasher canvas.

parameters.label: Curve Mouse Line Path
parameters.description: If 'Draw Mouse Line' is active, this makes the line follow a curved path that accounts for Dasher's non-linear coordinate space.

parameters.label: Start/Stop with Mouse
parameters.description: Enables starting and stopping the Dasher motion by moving the mouse.

parameters.label: Start/Stop with Spacebar
parameters.description: Enables using the spacebar to start and stop the Dasher motion.

parameters.label: Auto Palette Switch
parameters.description: Switch from color palette in setting automatically to the one provided in the alphabet.

parameters.label: Turbo Mode
parameters.description: Boost speed when holding key1 or right mouse button.

parameters.label: Smoothing Pressure Mode
parameters.description: Use Press-Input in the Smoothing-Input-Filter.

parameters.label: Show Smoothed Mouse Pos
parameters.description: If enabled, the mouse indicator will show the smoothed position, not the raw input.

parameters.label: Draw Smoothed Mouse Line
parameters.description: If enabled, the drawn mouse line will also be smoothed, showing the filtered input path.

parameters.label: Smooth Forwards Only
parameters.description: If enabled, input smoothing is only applied when moving forward (zooming in), not when reversing.

parameters.label: Precise Dynamics
parameters.description: Enables a more precise, but potentially less smooth, physics model for movement.

parameters.label: Auto-Calibrate Target
parameters.description: Automatically adjusts the 'straight-ahead' point based on the user's average pointer position.

parameters.label: Remap Extreme Angles
parameters.description: Distorts geometry to provide more space for navigating at extreme up/down angles.

parameters.label: Automatic Speed Control
parameters.description: Automatically adjusts the maximum writing speed based on user performance.

parameters.label: Adaptive Language Model
parameters.description: Whether language model should learn as you enter text.

parameters.label: Nonlinear Y-Axis
parameters.description: Apply nonlinearities to Y axis (i.e. compress top & bottom).

parameters.label: Stop When Pointer Leaves
parameters.description: Automatically stops Dasher motion if the mouse cursor leaves the canvas area.

parameters.label: Back-off on Release
parameters.description: If enabled, releasing a button will cause Dasher to slightly zoom out, making it easier to correct mistakes.

parameters.label: Second Button Reverses
parameters.description: When enabled, the second button in a two-button setup will trigger a reverse/zoom-out action.

parameters.label: Invert Double Press Action
parameters.description: Inverts the function of a double press on the second button.

parameters.label: Slow Start
parameters.description: When enabled, Dasher will gradually accelerate to the desired speed from a standstill.

parameters.label: Copy on Stop
parameters.description: Copy all text to clipboard whenever we stop.

parameters.label: Speak on Stop
parameters.description: Speak all text whenever we stop.

parameters.label: Speak Words
parameters.description: Speak words as they are written.

parameters.label: Draw Help Path
parameters.description: When we give help, show the shortest path to the target sentence.

parameters.label: Enable Release Time Logic
parameters.description: Toggles timing behavior upon button release in two-push mode.

parameters.label: Simulate Transparency
parameters.description: Enable the internal color mixing and thus the need to support alpha blending in the renderer.

parameters.label: Screen Orientation
parameters.description: Screen Orientation.

parameters.label: Max Speed (bits/sec)
parameters.description: The maximum writing speed. If 'Automatic Speed Control' is off, this is the fixed speed.

parameters.label: Demo Framerate
parameters.description: The target framerate for running automated demos.

parameters.label: Language Model
parameters.description: LanguageModelID.

parameters.label: Dasher Font Size
parameters.description: Font size reached at crosshair (in points).

parameters.label: Message Font Size
parameters.description: Size of font for messages (in points).

parameters.label: Node Shape
parameters.description: Shapes to render in (see Options::Rendering_Shape_Types).

parameters.label: Start Mode
parameters.description: Movement Starting Mode.

parameters.label: Uniform Probability
parameters.description: Uniform probability weight (×1000). Higher values make less-probable symbols larger.

parameters.label: Mouse Position Distance
parameters.description: MousePositionBoxDistance.

parameters.label: Pinyin Sort Threshold
parameters.description: Sort converted syms in descending probability order up to this percentage.

parameters.label: Message Display Time
parameters.description: Time for which non-modal messages are displayed, in ms.

parameters.label: Max N-gram Order
parameters.description: Maximum n-gram order for the language model.

parameters.label: Language Model Exclusion
parameters.description: LMExclusion.

parameters.label: LM Update Exclusion
parameters.description: LMUpdateExclusion.

parameters.label: LM Alpha
parameters.description: Language model alpha blending parameter.

parameters.label: LM Beta
parameters.description: Language model beta parameter.

parameters.label: LM Mixture
parameters.description: Language model mixture parameter.

parameters.label: Mouse Line Width
parameters.description: Sets the thickness of the line drawn to the mouse cursor.

parameters.label: Screen Geometry
parameters.description: Changes the geometric projection used to display the Dasher world.

parameters.label: Word Alpha
parameters.description: Alpha value for word-based model.

parameters.label: User Log Level
parameters.description: Controls level of user logging, 0 = none, 1 = short, 2 = detailed, 3 = both.

parameters.label: Zoom Steps
parameters.description: Defines how many discrete steps are needed to zoom from the outer edge to the center.

parameters.label: B-Parameter
parameters.description: Number of boxes for button menu mode.

parameters.label: S-Parameter
parameters.description: Algorithmic constant related to speed or sensitivity in button mode.

parameters.label: Scan Time
parameters.description: In modes that automatically scan options, this sets the time in milliseconds to wait at each step.

parameters.label: R-Parameter
parameters.description: Button mode box non-uniformity.

parameters.label: Right Zoom Multiplier
parameters.description: A multiplier affecting zoom speed when using compass mode.

parameters.label: Node Budget
parameters.description: Target (min) number of node objects to maintain.

parameters.label: Outline Width
parameters.description: Absolute value is line width to draw boxes (fill iff >=0).

parameters.label: Text Padding
parameters.description: Pixel distance to inset the letters into the boxes.

parameters.label: Min Node Size
parameters.description: Minimum size of node (in dasher coords) to draw.

parameters.label: Nonlinear X-Axis
parameters.description: Nonlinear compression of X-axis (0 = none, higher = more extreme).

parameters.label: Auto-Speed Sensitivity
parameters.description: Sensitivity of automatic speed control (percent).

parameters.label: Socket Port
parameters.description: UDP/TCP socket to use for network socket input.

parameters.label: Socket X Min
parameters.description: Bottom of range of X values expected from network input.

parameters.label: Socket X Max
parameters.description: Top of range of X values expected from network input.

parameters.label: Socket Y Min
parameters.description: Bottom of range of Y values expected from network input.

parameters.label: Socket Y Max
parameters.description: Top of range of Y values expected from network input.

parameters.label: Circle Start Size
parameters.description: Percentage of nominal vertical range to use for radius of start circle.

parameters.label: Two Button Offset
parameters.description: A positional or timing offset related to the second button's input.

parameters.label: Button Hold Time
parameters.description: Minimum time (in ms) a button must be pressed to be considered a 'hold' instead of a 'tap'.

parameters.label: Multi-Press Window
parameters.description: The time window (in ms) within which multiple presses are counted as a single sequence.

parameters.label: Slow Start Duration
parameters.description: The time in milliseconds it takes to accelerate to full speed when 'Slow Start' is enabled.

parameters.label: Smoothing Amount
parameters.description: The time constant for input smoothing. Higher values result in smoother but less responsive input.

parameters.label: Two-Push Outer Zone
parameters.description: Defines the size of the outer zone for the 'two-push' control scheme.

parameters.label: Long Push Time
parameters.description: Defines the minimum duration (in ms) of a 'long push'.

parameters.label: Short Push Time
parameters.description: Defines the maximum duration (in ms) of a 'short push'.

parameters.label: Two-Push Tolerance
parameters.description: Positional tolerance for activating controls in the 'two-push' scheme.

parameters.label: Dynamic Button Lag
parameters.description: Lag time specifically for the two-push dynamic mode.

parameters.label: Static Zoom Time
parameters.description: The time in milliseconds for static mode to scan from top to bottom.

parameters.label: Static Zoom Step
parameters.description: The amount of zoom applied per step in static mode.

parameters.label: Demo Springiness
parameters.description: A physics parameter for the automated cursor's 'springiness' in demo mode.

parameters.label: Demo Noise Memory
parameters.description: A physics parameter controlling the 'memory' or consistency of random movements in demo mode.

parameters.label: Demo Noise Magnitude
parameters.description: Controls the magnitude or intensity of random movements in demo mode.

parameters.label: Zoom Sensitivity / Max Zoom
parameters.description: Controls zoom mechanics in click mode.

parameters.label: Auto-Speed Increment
parameters.description: The amount the speed is increased by at each update interval if the user is navigating well.

parameters.label: Auto-Speed Update Freq.
parameters.description: When 'Auto Speed Control' is on, this is how often the speed is re-evaluated.

parameters.label: Speed Reduction on Reverse
parameters.description: The amount the speed is decreased when the user reverses direction.

parameters.label: Stylus Tap Time
parameters.description: The maximum time (in ms) for a stylus press to be considered a 'tap' for selecting items.

parameters.label: Margin Width
parameters.description: Width of RHS margin (in Dasher co-ords).

parameters.label: Target Calibration Offset
parameters.description: A manual vertical offset to adjust the 'straight-ahead' point.

parameters.label: Horizontal Speed Limit
parameters.description: A multiplier that caps the maximum horizontal speed, making it easier to stay on target.

parameters.label: Game Help Distance
parameters.description: Distance of sentence from center to decide user needs help.

parameters.label: Game Help Time
parameters.description: Time for which user must need help before help drawn.

parameters.label: Alphabet
parameters.description: AlphabetID.

parameters.label: Alphabet History 1
parameters.description: Alphabet History 1.

parameters.label: Alphabet History 2
parameters.description: Alphabet History 2.

parameters.label: Alphabet History 3
parameters.description: Alphabet History 3.

parameters.label: Alphabet History 4
parameters.description: Alphabet History 4.

parameters.label: Color Palette
parameters.description: ColourID.

parameters.label: Dasher Font
parameters.description: DasherFont.

parameters.label: Game Text File
parameters.description: User-specified file with strings to practice writing.

parameters.label: Input Filter
parameters.description: Input filter used to provide the current control mode.

parameters.label: Input Device
parameters.description: Driver for the input device.

parameters.label: Button Mappings
parameters.description: Button assignments used in UI.

parameters.label: Joystick X Axis
parameters.description: Joystick axis used for X-axis input.

parameters.label: Joystick Y Axis
parameters.description: Joystick axis used for Y-axis input.
